@noodle_76 The "deez nuts" joke burst onto the scene in 2015, thanks to Vine sensation WelvenDaGreat. But its roots go back even further to Dr. Dre's 1992 track "Deeez Nuuuts" from "The Chronic" album. the joke is simple yet effective: someone asks if you've heard about "deez nuts," and when you inquire further, they hit you with a punchline like "Got 'em!" It's unexpected, absurd, and just plain silly. What makes it so funny? Perhaps it's the sheer randomness
